requirement_topic.en: Grid Voltage Compatibility — Gambia 230/400 V vs China 220/380 V, NAWEC Grid Connection
requirement_topic.zh: 电网电压兼容性——冈比亚230/400 V与中国220/380 V、NAWEC并网
requirement_topic.zht: 電網電壓兼容性——甘比亞230/400 V與中國220/380 V、NAWEC併網

summary.en: NAWEC (National Water and Electricity Company) is Gambia's sole state-owned electricity utility, responsible for generation, transmission, and distribution. Gambia's national grid operates at 230 V single-phase, 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz — consistent with the IEC standard used across most of West Africa. All grid-connected BESS installations in Gambia require NAWEC grid-connection approval. NAWEC's published technical grid-connection specifications specifically for BESS had not been confirmed from publicly accessible official sources as of the dataset date; project-specific connection terms must be obtained directly from NAWEC. The voltage difference between Gambia (230/400 V) and China (220/380 V) — nominally about 4–5% — requires BESS power conversion system (PCS) re-parameterisation of voltage protection thresholds, ride-through settings, and reactive power response before commissioning. Most utility-scale BESS projects in Gambia are donor-funded (ECOWAS ROGEP off-grid program, World Bank, AfDB, UNDP) and project-owner technical specifications govern grid-connection requirements in the absence of confirmed NAWEC public grid codes.
summary.zh: NAWEC（国家水电公司）是冈比亚唯一的国有电力公用事业公司，负责发电、输电和配电。冈比亚国家电网运行参数为单相230 V、三相400 V、50 Hz——与西非大多数地区采用的IEC标准一致。冈比亚所有并网BESS装置均须取得NAWEC并网批准。截至本数据集日期，NAWEC公开发布的专门针对BESS并网的技术规格尚未从可公开获取的官方来源得到确认；项目专属并网条款须直接向NAWEC获取。冈比亚（230/400 V）与中国（220/380 V）之间的电压差——名义上约4–5%——需要在调试前重新配置BESS储能变流器（PCS）的电压保护阈值、穿越参数及无功功率响应。冈比亚大多数公用事业规模BESS项目由捐助方资助（ECOWAS ROGEP离网项目、世界银行、非洲开发银行、联合国开发计划署），在尚无NAWEC公开电网规范确认的情况下，项目业主技术规格主导并网要求。
summary.zht: NAWEC（國家水電公司）是甘比亞唯一的國有電力公用事業公司，負責發電、輸電和配電。甘比亞國家電網運行參數為單相230 V、三相400 V、50 Hz——與西非大多數地區採用的IEC標準一致。甘比亞所有併網BESS裝置均須取得NAWEC併網批准。截至本數據集日期，NAWEC公開發布的專門針對BESS併網的技術規格尚未從可公開獲取的官方來源得到確認；項目專屬併網條款須直接向NAWEC獲取。甘比亞（230/400 V）與中國（220/380 V）之間的電壓差——名義上約4–5%——需要在調試前重新配置BESS儲能變流器（PCS）的電壓保護閾值、穿越參數及無功功率響應。甘比亞大多數公用事業規模BESS項目由捐助方資助（ECOWAS ROGEP離網項目、世界銀行、非洲開發銀行、聯合國開發計劃署），在尚無NAWEC公開電網規範確認的情況下，項目業主技術規格主導併網要求。

standards_or_laws: NAWEC Grid Connection Requirements — no publicly confirmed BESS-specific technical specification as of dataset date; engage NAWEC directly for project-specific requirements
IEC 60038:2009 — IEC Standard Voltages (230/400 V 50 Hz IEC standard grid parameters applied in Gambia)
ECOWAS ROGEP (Regional Off-Grid Electrification Project) — donor-project specifications govern grid-connection and quality requirements for off-grid and hybrid BESS projects
PURA (Public Utilities Regulatory Authority) — electricity sector regulator; operating licence conditions may impose grid-connection performance obligations

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2017 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). China's grid operates at 50 Hz, 220/380 V (220 V single-phase, 380 V three-phase) — different from Gambia's 230/400 V. PCS voltage protection thresholds and ride-through settings configured for China's 220/380 V grid must be re-parameterised for Gambia's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid conditions before grid-connection testing and commissioning. Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals are not recognised by NAWEC or PURA.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2017（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国电网运行参数为50 Hz、220/380 V（单相220 V、三相380 V）——与冈比亚230/400 V不同。针对中国220/380 V电网配置的PCS电压保护阈值和穿越参数，须在并网测试和调试前重新针对冈比亚230/400 V、50 Hz电网条件进行参数配置。中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不被NAWEC或PURA认可。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2017（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國電網運行參數為50 Hz、220/380 V（單相220 V、三相380 V）——與甘比亞230/400 V不同。針對中國220/380 V電網配置的PCS電壓保護閾值和穿越參數，須在併網測試和調試前重新針對甘比亞230/400 V、50 Hz電網條件進行參數配置。中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不被NAWEC或PURA認可。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2017 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals do not satisfy NAWEC's Gambia grid-connection requirements. Key technical differences requiring attention: (a) grid voltage — Gambia is 230/400 V whereas China is 220/380 V; PCS voltage protection thresholds and ride-through settings must be reconfigured and retested for Gambia's grid parameters; (b) frequency — both Gambia and China operate at 50 Hz, so no frequency-related re-parameterisation is required; (c) NAWEC project-specific connection agreement terms — engage NAWEC at the earliest project stage to obtain technical requirements before equipment design is finalised, noting that no publicly confirmed BESS grid-connection specification has been identified; (d) donor-project specifications — where BESS is donor-funded (ECOWAS ROGEP, World Bank, AfDB), the project owner's technical specification typically mandates IEC standards including IEC 62933-2-1 for BESS performance and IEC 62933-5-2 for safety; (e) power quality and harmonics — confirm NAWEC's or project-owner's THD and power-factor requirements for BESS PCS output.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不满足NAWEC冈比亚并网要求。需注意的主要技术差异：（a）电网电压——冈比亚为230/400 V，中国为220/380 V；PCS电压保护阈值和穿越参数须针对冈比亚电网参数重新配置并重新测试；（b）频率——冈比亚和中国均为50 Hz，无需进行频率相关重新参数配置；（c）NAWEC项目专属并网协议条款——在设备设计最终确定前，应在项目最早阶段与NAWEC接触以获取技术要求，注意尚未发现任何公开确认的BESS并网规格；（d）捐助方项目规格——若BESS由捐助方资助（ECOWAS ROGEP、世界银行、非洲开发银行），项目业主技术规格通常要求IEC标准，包括BESS性能的IEC 62933-2-1和安全的IEC 62933-5-2；（e）电能质量和谐波——确认NAWEC或项目业主对BESS PCS输出的THD和功率因数要求。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不滿足NAWEC甘比亞併網要求。需注意的主要技術差異：（a）電網電壓——甘比亞為230/400 V，中國為220/380 V；PCS電壓保護閾值和穿越參數須針對甘比亞電網參數重新配置並重新測試；（b）頻率——甘比亞和中國均為50 Hz，無需進行頻率相關重新參數配置；（c）NAWEC項目專屬併網協議條款——在設備設計最終確定前，應在項目最早階段與NAWEC接觸以獲取技術要求，注意尚未發現任何公開確認的BESS併網規格；（d）捐助方項目規格——若BESS由捐助方資助（ECOWAS ROGEP、世界銀行、非洲開發銀行），項目業主技術規格通常要求IEC標準，包括BESS性能的IEC 62933-2-1和安全的IEC 62933-5-2；（e）電能質量和諧波——確認NAWEC或項目業主對BESS PCS輸出的THD和功率因數要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — NAWEC grid-connection approval is required for all grid-connected BESS in Gambia; technical requirements are project-specific and no publicly confirmed BESS grid-connection specification has been identified as of dataset date — engage NAWEC directly
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to Gambia

source.publisher: NAWEC (National Water and Electricity Company, Gambia)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy NAWEC's Gambia grid-connection requirements. BESS PCS must be re-parameterised for Gambia's 230/400 V at 50 Hz grid (China is 220/380 V at 50 Hz — frequency is the same, but voltage differs by ~4–5%). Engage NAWEC and PURA at the earliest project stage to determine connection agreement technical requirements. Most Gambia BESS projects are donor-funded — obtain and comply with the project owner's (ECOWAS ROGEP / World Bank / AfDB) technical specification, which typically references IEC 62933. No publicly accessible NAWEC technical specification specifically for BESS grid connection has been confirmed as of the dataset date.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足NAWEC冈比亚并网要求。BESS储能变流器须重新针对冈比亚230/400 V 50 Hz电网进行参数配置（中国为220/380 V 50 Hz——频率相同，但电压相差约4–5%）。应在项目最早阶段与NAWEC和PURA接触，确定并网协议技术要求。冈比亚大多数BESS项目由捐助方资助——须获取并遵守项目业主（ECOWAS ROGEP/世界银行/非洲开发银行）的技术规格，该规格通常引用IEC 62933。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认NAWEC公开发布专门针对BESS并网的技术规格。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足NAWEC甘比亞併網要求。BESS儲能變流器須重新針對甘比亞230/400 V 50 Hz電網進行參數配置（中國為220/380 V 50 Hz——頻率相同，但電壓相差約4–5%）。應在項目最早階段與NAWEC和PURA接觸，確定併網協議技術要求。甘比亞大多數BESS項目由捐助方資助——須獲取並遵守項目業主（ECOWAS ROGEP/世界銀行/非洲開發銀行）的技術規格，該規格通常引用IEC 62933。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認NAWEC公開發布專門針對BESS併網的技術規格。

requirement_topic.en: Grid Frequency — 50 Hz Alignment (No Gap) and NAWEC Power Quality Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: 电网频率——50 Hz一致（无差距）及NAWEC电能质量要求
requirement_topic.zht: 電網頻率——50 Hz一致（無差距）及NAWEC電能質量要求

summary.en: Gambia's national grid operates at 50 Hz, consistent with the IEC standard used across West Africa and the same as China's 50 Hz grid. This means no frequency-related re-parameterisation of BESS PCS inverter control firmware is required when moving from China to Gambia — a meaningful advantage compared to export markets operating at 60 Hz (e.g., the United States). However, NAWEC's grid is characterised by significant voltage instability, frequent outages, and limited short-circuit capacity, particularly outside Banjul and Kanifing Municipal Council areas. BESS PCS ride-through settings must accommodate Gambia's grid stability characteristics. Power quality requirements (harmonic distortion limits, power factor, voltage regulation contribution) for BESS PCS output have not been confirmed from publicly accessible NAWEC technical specifications as of the dataset date; donor-project specifications typically reference IEC 61000 series for power quality.
summary.zh: 冈比亚国家电网运行频率为50 Hz，与西非IEC标准一致，与中国50 Hz电网相同。这意味着从中国到冈比亚，BESS PCS逆变器控制固件无需进行频率相关重新参数配置——与运行在60 Hz的出口市场（如美国）相比，这是一个明显优势。然而，NAWEC电网电压不稳定、停电频繁、短路容量有限，在班珠尔和卡尼芬市政区以外尤为突出。BESS PCS穿越参数须适应冈比亚电网稳定特性。截至本数据集日期，NAWEC公开发布的技术规格中尚未确认BESS PCS输出的电能质量要求（谐波失真限值、功率因数、电压调节贡献）；捐助方项目规格通常引用IEC 61000系列作为电能质量标准。
summary.zht: 甘比亞國家電網運行頻率為50 Hz，與西非IEC標準一致，與中國50 Hz電網相同。這意味著從中國到甘比亞，BESS PCS逆變器控制韌體無需進行頻率相關重新參數配置——與運行在60 Hz的出口市場（如美國）相比，這是一個明顯優勢。然而，NAWEC電網電壓不穩定、停電頻繁、短路容量有限，在班珠爾和卡尼芬市政區以外尤為突出。BESS PCS穿越參數須適應甘比亞電網穩定特性。截至本數據集日期，NAWEC公開發布的技術規格中尚未確認BESS PCS輸出的電能質量要求（諧波失真限值、功率因數、電壓調節貢獻）；捐助方項目規格通常引用IEC 61000系列作為電能質量標準。

standards_or_laws: IEC 60038:2009 — IEC Standard Voltages (50 Hz grid standard applied in Gambia)
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic Compatibility (power quality limits expected in donor-project specifications)
NAWEC Technical Requirements — no publicly confirmed power quality specification for BESS as of dataset date; verify directly with NAWEC

summary.en: China's national grid operates at 50 Hz, 220/380 V. Chinese BESS PCS inverter firmware is designed and validated for 50 Hz operation. The 50 Hz frequency alignment between China and Gambia means Chinese BESS PCS products do not require frequency-related firmware reconfiguration for Gambia. Power quality standards for Chinese BESS PCS output are governed by GB/T 14549-1993 (Quality of Electric Energy Supply — Harmonics in Public Supply Networks) and GB/T 15543-2008 (Quality of Electric Energy Supply — Three-Phase Voltage Unbalance). These Chinese power quality standards are not confirmed as accepted equivalents by NAWEC or donor-project specifications.
summary.zh: 中国国家电网运行参数为50 Hz、220/380 V。中国BESS PCS逆变器固件针对50 Hz运行进行设计和验证。中国与冈比亚50 Hz频率一致，意味着中国BESS PCS产品无需为冈比亚进行频率相关固件重新配置。中国BESS PCS输出电能质量标准由GB/T 14549-1993（供电电能质量——公用电网谐波）和GB/T 15543-2008（电能质量——三相电压不平衡）管控。上述中国电能质量标准尚未确认被NAWEC或捐助方项目规格接受为等效依据。
summary.zht: 中國國家電網運行參數為50 Hz、220/380 V。中國BESS PCS逆變器韌體針對50 Hz運行進行設計和驗證。中國與甘比亞50 Hz頻率一致，意味著中國BESS PCS產品無需為甘比亞進行頻率相關韌體重新配置。中國BESS PCS輸出電能質量標準由GB/T 14549-1993（供電電能質量——公用電網諧波）和GB/T 15543-2008（電能質量——三相電壓不平衡）管控。上述中國電能質量標準尚未確認被NAWEC或捐助方項目規格接受為等效依據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 14549-1993 — 电能质量·公用电网谐波 (Quality of Electric Energy Supply — Harmonics in Public Supply Networks)
GB/T 15543-2008 — 电能质量·三相电压不平衡 (Quality of Electric Energy Supply — Three-Phase Voltage Unbalance)

gap.en: No gap on grid frequency — both Gambia and China operate at 50 Hz. The remaining gaps are: (a) NAWEC grid stability characteristics — Gambia's grid is weaker and less stable than Chinese urban grids; PCS ride-through and reactive-power-support settings must be confirmed with NAWEC or donor-project specification; (b) power quality requirements — Chinese GB/T power quality standards are not confirmed as equivalent by NAWEC; confirm IEC 61000 series limits with the project owner or NAWEC before PCS commissioning; (c) voltage regulation — BESS PCS voltage regulation contribution parameters must be set for Gambia's 230/400 V, not China's 220/380 V.
gap.zh: 电网频率无差距——冈比亚和中国均为50 Hz。剩余差距包括：（a）NAWEC电网稳定特性——冈比亚电网比中国城市电网更弱、更不稳定；PCS穿越和无功功率支持参数须与NAWEC或捐助方项目规格确认；（b）电能质量要求——中国GB/T电能质量标准不被NAWEC确认为等效依据；在PCS调试前须与项目业主或NAWEC确认IEC 61000系列限值；（c）电压调节——BESS PCS电压调节贡献参数须针对冈比亚230/400 V设置，而非中国220/380 V。
gap.zht: 電網頻率無差距——甘比亞和中國均為50 Hz。剩餘差距包括：（a）NAWEC電網穩定特性——甘比亞電網比中國城市電網更弱、更不穩定；PCS穿越和無功功率支持參數須與NAWEC或捐助方項目規格確認；（b）電能質量要求——中國GB/T電能質量標準不被NAWEC確認為等效依據；在PCS調試前須與項目業主或NAWEC確認IEC 61000系列限值；（c）電壓調節——BESS PCS電壓調節貢獻參數須針對甘比亞230/400 V設置，而非中國220/380 V。

mandatory_status.target: No mandatory gap on frequency (50 Hz aligned); power quality requirements for BESS PCS not confirmed from official NAWEC sources as of dataset date — govern by donor-project specification or verify with NAWEC
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — Chinese power quality standards apply within China; 50 Hz PCS configuration is directly transferable to Gambia

source.publisher: NAWEC (National Water and Electricity Company, Gambia)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Grid frequency alignment (both 50 Hz) is a genuine advantage for China-to-Gambia BESS export — no frequency re-parameterisation required. Voltage difference (China 220/380 V vs Gambia 230/400 V) requires PCS voltage threshold reconfiguration. Power quality requirements are not confirmed from NAWEC public sources; align with donor-project specification (typically IEC 61000 series) and confirm with NAWEC before commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 电网频率一致（均为50 Hz）是中国BESS出口冈比亚的真实优势——无需进行频率重新参数配置。电压差（中国220/380 V与冈比亚230/400 V）需要重新配置PCS电压阈值。电能质量要求尚未从NAWEC公开来源确认；请与捐助方项目规格（通常为IEC 61000系列）保持一致，并在调试前与NAWEC确认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 電網頻率一致（均為50 Hz）是中國BESS出口甘比亞的真實優勢——無需進行頻率重新參數配置。電壓差（中國220/380 V與甘比亞230/400 V）需要重新配置PCS電壓閾值。電能質量要求尚未從NAWEC公開來源確認；請與捐助方項目規格（通常為IEC 61000系列）保持一致，並在調試前與NAWEC確認。

requirement_topic.en: PURA Operating Licence and Regulatory Approval for BESS in Gambia
requirement_topic.zh: 冈比亚BESS的PURA运营许可证及监管批准
requirement_topic.zht: 甘比亞BESS的PURA運營許可證及監管批准

summary.en: PURA (Public Utilities Regulatory Authority) is Gambia's multi-sector utility regulator, established under the Public Utilities Regulatory Authority Act. PURA regulates the electricity sector including generation, transmission, distribution, and, by extension, energy storage systems connected to the grid or operating as independent power producers. Any entity operating a BESS installation in Gambia — whether grid-connected or off-grid above a regulated capacity threshold — is expected to obtain a PURA operating licence or registration. The exact threshold and licence category applicable to BESS installations had not been confirmed from publicly accessible PURA technical guidance as of the dataset date. PURA licence applications require technical documentation including system specifications, safety plans, and demonstration of compliance with applicable standards. For donor-funded projects (e.g., ECOWAS ROGEP), PURA engagement typically occurs as part of project development and financial close.
summary.zh: PURA（公用事业监管局）是冈比亚依据《公用事业监管局法》设立的多部门公用事业监管机构。PURA监管电力行业，包括发电、输电、配电及其延伸——接入电网或作为独立发电商运营的储能系统。在冈比亚运营BESS装置的任何实体——无论是并网还是超过受监管容量门槛的离网——均须取得PURA运营许可证或注册。截至本数据集日期，BESS装置适用的具体门槛和许可证类别尚未从PURA公开发布的技术指南得到确认。PURA许可证申请须提供技术文件，包括系统规格、安全计划及对适用标准的合规证明。对于捐助方资助的项目（如ECOWAS ROGEP），PURA接触通常作为项目开发和财务关闭的一部分进行。
summary.zht: PURA（公用事業監管局）是甘比亞依據《公用事業監管局法》設立的多部門公用事業監管機構。PURA監管電力行業，包括發電、輸電、配電及其延伸——接入電網或作為獨立發電商運營的儲能系統。在甘比亞運營BESS裝置的任何實體——無論是併網還是超過受監管容量門閾的離網——均須取得PURA運營許可證或注冊。截至本數據集日期，BESS裝置適用的具體門閾和許可證類別尚未從PURA公開發布的技術指南得到確認。PURA許可證申請須提供技術文件，包括系統規格、安全計劃及對適用標準的合規證明。對於捐助方資助的項目（如ECOWAS ROGEP），PURA接觸通常作為項目開發和財務關閉的一部分進行。

standards_or_laws: PURA (Public Utilities Regulatory Authority) Act, Gambia — governing legislation for electricity sector licensing
PURA Electricity Licence Conditions — verify current requirements and applicable BESS licence category directly with PURA
ECOWAS ROGEP Regional Off-Grid Electrification Project — donor framework that includes PURA engagement protocols for off-grid and hybrid BESS projects

summary.en: Chinese BESS operators obtain grid-connection approval and project approval from the National Energy Administration (NEA) and local energy bureaus. Chinese project approvals are not recognised by PURA and do not substitute for a Gambia PURA operating licence. Chinese manufacturers supplying to a Gambia project must support the project developer's PURA licence application with relevant technical documentation — including system specifications, IEC-standard compliance evidence, and safety plans — rather than relying on Chinese domestic approvals.
summary.zh: 中国BESS运营商从国家能源局（NEA）和地方能源主管部门获取并网批准和项目审批。中国项目审批不被PURA认可，不能替代冈比亚PURA运营许可证。向冈比亚项目供货的中国制造商须以相关技术文件支持项目开发商的PURA许可证申请——包括系统规格、IEC标准合规证据和安全计划——而非依赖中国国内审批。
summary.zht: 中國BESS運營商從國家能源局（NEA）和地方能源主管部門獲取併網批准和項目審批。中國項目審批不被PURA認可，不能替代甘比亞PURA運營許可證。向甘比亞項目供貨的中國製造商須以相關技術文件支持項目開發商的PURA許可證申請——包括系統規格、IEC標準合規證據和安全計劃——而非依賴中國國內審批。

standards_or_laws: National Energy Administration (NEA) — China's electricity sector regulator; approvals not transferable to Gambia
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)

gap.en: Gap: PURA operating licence is a mandatory regulatory gate for BESS operation in Gambia. Chinese domestic project approvals and NEA grid-connection approvals are not recognised by PURA. Chinese BESS manufacturers and exporters should: (a) confirm the PURA licence category and capacity threshold applicable to the specific BESS installation with the project developer; (b) prepare IEC-standard compliance documentation (IEC 62619, IEC 62933-5-2) to support the PURA licence application; (c) engage a Gambia-based project developer or legal adviser familiar with PURA licensing requirements; (d) for donor-funded projects, follow the procurement and regulatory engagement procedures of the relevant donor agency (ECOWAS ROGEP, World Bank, AfDB).
gap.zh: 差距：PURA运营许可证是冈比亚BESS运营的强制监管门槛。中国国内项目审批和NEA并网批准不被PURA认可。中国BESS制造商和出口商应：（a）与项目开发商确认适用于具体BESS装置的PURA许可证类别和容量门槛；（b）准备IEC标准合规文件（IEC 62619、IEC 62933-5-2）以支持PURA许可证申请；（c）聘请熟悉PURA许可证要求的冈比亚本地项目开发商或法律顾问；（d）对于捐助方资助的项目，遵循相关捐助方机构（ECOWAS ROGEP、世界银行、非洲开发银行）的采购和监管接触程序。
gap.zht: 差距：PURA運營許可證是甘比亞BESS運營的強制監管門檻。中國國內項目審批和NEA併網批准不被PURA認可。中國BESS製造商和出口商應：（a）與項目開發商確認適用於具體BESS裝置的PURA許可證類別和容量門閾；（b）準備IEC標準合規文件（IEC 62619、IEC 62933-5-2）以支持PURA許可證申請；（c）聘請熟悉PURA許可證要求的甘比亞本地項目開發商或法律顧問；（d）對於捐助方資助的項目，遵循相關捐助方機構（ECOWAS ROGEP、世界銀行、非洲開發銀行）的採購和監管接觸程序。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — PURA operating licence required for electricity sector operations in Gambia; exact threshold for BESS unconfirmed from public sources as of dataset date — verify directly with PURA
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable — Chinese NEA approvals govern domestic operations; not transferable to Gambia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] PURA operating licence is a mandatory regulatory gate for BESS projects in Gambia. Chinese domestic project approvals are not transferable. Engage PURA directly and early in the project development cycle to confirm licence category, capacity thresholds, and required technical documentation. Support the licence application with IEC-standard compliance evidence (IEC 62619, IEC 62933-5-2) — Chinese GB/T certificates alone are not sufficient.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] PURA运营许可证是冈比亚BESS项目的强制监管门槛。中国国内项目审批不可转用。应在项目开发周期早期直接与PURA接触，确认许可证类别、容量门槛及所需技术文件。以IEC标准合规证据（IEC 62619、IEC 62933-5-2）支持许可证申请——仅持有中国GB/T证书不足够。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] PURA運營許可證是甘比亞BESS項目的強制監管門檻。中國國內項目審批不可轉用。應在項目開發周期早期直接與PURA接觸，確認許可證類別、容量門閾及所需技術文件。以IEC標準合規證據（IEC 62619、IEC 62933-5-2）支持許可證申請——僅持有中國GB/T證書不足夠。
